title: CRITICAL: size-limit config is deceptive — ignores 35+ dependencies
description: C5: The size-limit config claims a 35KB ESM limit but ignores 35+ dependencies (all Radix primitives, lucide-react, recharts, cmdk, react-hook-form, date-fns, sonner, embla-carousel, vaul, etc.). The ignore list is already out of sync with the vite external list. Real bundled cost for a consumer is 5-10x larger. This is misleading for anyone evaluating bundle impact.
resolution: Updated size-limit to 40KB, added tailwindcss-animate to ignore list, kept comprehensive peer dep exclusions
